'''Nars Dojah''' was the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quartermaster/Legends|quartermaster]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces at [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7|RMSU-7]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He achieved this position because of the death of [[Filba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
